---
name: cc-lens steering bootstrap
description: Steering files were bootstrapped for cc-lens in April 2026; no templates or principles files existed in .kiro/settings/
type: project
---

Steering bootstrap completed 2026-04-10. Created product.md, tech.md, structure.md in `.kiro/steering/`.

No `.kiro/settings/templates/` or `.kiro/settings/rules/` directories existed — steering was generated directly from codebase analysis.

**Why:** First-time bootstrap; project had no prior steering files.

**How to apply:** In future sync runs, treat the three generated files as the baseline. Verify they still reflect current code before proposing updates.
